meta.title: RED ALERT LIVE – Know Where to Run Before the Siren Ends
meta.description: RED ALERT LIVE – When the siren sounds, you know where to run. Live navigation to the nearest shelter in seconds. Tested during real alerts. Join the beta.
logo.sub: Smart shelter navigation app during alerts
hero.title: When the siren sounds – know where to run before it ends
hero.subtitle: RED ALERT LIVE detects alerts relevant to your area, finds the nearest shelters, and navigates you there – one tap, in seconds.
hero.list1: Live navigation to the nearest shelter – no lists, no confusion, one clear screen
hero.list2: Precise alert for your area only – no noise from sirens that don't apply to you
hero.list3: Three alert sources simultaneously – including backup if the official server is overloaded
hero.email_box_title: Sign up now – get first beta access
hero.note: Available for Android and soon for iPhone. The app was tested in real alert conditions.
how.title: The moment the siren sounds – what goes through your mind
how.intro: Three seconds of panic. Three questions with no immediate answers. RED ALERT LIVE was built for exactly that moment.
how.card1_title: 🔍 "Where is there even a shelter here?"
how.card1_text: You're on the street, in a park, in a car, in an unfamiliar neighborhood. No time to Google. RED ALERT LIVE shows you the two nearest shelters – in meters.
how.card2_text: Safe room? Stairwell? Public shelter? The app decides for you and navigates directly – no thinking required.
how.card3_text: Every area has a different response time – the difference can be significant. The alert is tailored to your area only, so you know exactly how much time you have to reach shelter.
flow.title: What actually happens during an alert
flow.intro: From the moment the siren sounds to when you're at the shelter entrance – 5 steps, all automatic, all without wasting a second.
flow.step1_desc: When the system detects an alert relevant to your area – an emergency process is triggered in the app.
flow.step2_desc: The app locates your current position and prepares a clear display so no second is wasted.
flow.step3_desc: One tap opens the app directly to the relevant emergency screen without confusing menus.
flow.step4_desc: Instead of a long list – the two nearest shelters are shown with distance to choose quickly.
flow.step5_desc: After selecting, the app starts live navigation and guides you to the destination shelter clearly.
flow.pill1: One clear screen in real time
flow.pill3: Less noise – more precision by area
flow.mini_note: RED ALERT LIVE is an additional tool, not a replacement for Home Front Command guidelines
flow.privacy_text: The goal: clean emergency experience, focused alerts, and clear information – without noise irrelevant to you.
features.title: What's inside – and why it's different
features.intro_html: Not another alert app showing a list of cities. RED ALERT LIVE was built from the ground up around one question: How many seconds until you're at the shelter entrance?
features.f1_text: Thousands of shelters across the country. The app shows the two nearest to your current location with precise distance.
features.f2_text: Choose a shelter, start navigation. No menus, no questions. The app leads you straight to the destination.
features.f3_text: Filter by precise city and zone – you'll receive an alert only when it's relevant to you. Not when there's a siren in the north and you're in the south.
features.f4_text: Home Front Command + two additional sources. If one is overloaded or down – the others continue. Tested during real alerts.
features.f5_text: Practice the route to your shelter at home, at work, in your neighborhood – before you actually need it.
features.f6_text: Alert history is stored only on your device. Not transferred to a server, not shared.
screens.title: The app in action
screens.intro: Map screen with shelters, live navigation, drill mode – an interface built for seconds of pressure.
manager.title: RED ALERT MANAGER – Shelter Management Platform for Authorities
manager.intro_html: A dedicated tool for local authorities, security forces, and professional emergency responders. Not a civilian app – an operational system for managing shelter inventory in the field.
manager.step1_desc: Interactive map with all registered shelters. View by city, area, shelter type – one click.
manager.step2_desc: Filter by city, settlement, type (shelter / safe room / protected space) and status. List view alongside the map for efficient management.
manager.step3_desc: Write operational notes directly on each shelter: capacity, accessibility, physical condition, equipment, entry restrictions.
manager.step4_desc: Statistical view of shelter distribution by city and area. Planning tool for identifying areas with insufficient coverage.
manager.step5_desc: Report field hazards: blocked shelter, dangerous access path, structural damage. Residents report from the app – the authority sees it in real time.
manager.audience_aria: Who RED ALERT MANAGER is for
manager.mini_note: Access to the manager system is restricted and secured – not available to the general public
manager.demo_text: We'd love to offer a demo tailored to your authority. Leave your details in the form and select "Professional" – we'll get back to you directly.
audience.title: Who it's for
audience.intro: Anyone who lives in an area with sirens – and wants to never have to guess next time.
audience.a1_text: You, your family, your kids. Everyone knows where to run. No panic, no guessing, no wasting precious seconds.
audience.a2_text: Digital access to shelter information for residents. Urban pilots with real field data.
audience.a3_text: Field tool for rapid navigation to protected spaces, GPS-based with an up-to-date national database.
beta.title: Leave your details – get first access
beta.intro: The app is in final beta stages. Limited spots. Those who register now will receive:
beta.list1: Direct download link – before the app goes live on the store
beta.list2: Opportunity to participate in field testing and influence development
beta.list3: Priority access to the final product
beta.city_help: City is required for authorities and professionals
beta.role_help: If you're not a resident – city and organization name will be required
beta.org_help: Organization name is required for authorities and professionals
beta.notes_placeholder: Tell us briefly how you'd like to use RED ALERT LIVE
beta.submit_alt: Send me an update when beta is ready
beta.note: We'll only use your details to send updates about the app and beta version. We won't share your email with third parties for marketing.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: The app is in advanced beta stages and being tested in the field. Those registered will get access first – before the store launch.
faq.q2: Was it tested during real alerts?
faq.a2: Yes. The system operates and was tested during real alerts – including a backup mechanism for when the official server is overloaded.
faq.q3: What's different from other alert apps?
faq.a3: Existing apps show alerts – RED ALERT LIVE navigates to a shelter. That's its only purpose. Live navigation, two nearest shelters, one clear screen with one tap.
faq.q4: Does the app replace the Home Front Command?
faq.a4: No. RED ALERT LIVE is an additional tool. Always follow the official guidelines of the Home Front Command.
faq.q5: What happens with the details I leave?
faq.a5: Used only to send updates about the app. We won't share your email with external parties for marketing.
faq.a6_html:
1. Unofficial application — RED ALERT LIVE is not an official application of the Home Front Command, IDF, State of Israel, or any government body. In any emergency, always follow Home Front Command guidelines.

2. Limitation of liability — Use is at the user's own risk. The app is provided "AS IS". Developers are not responsible for any direct, indirect, physical, psychological, or property damage resulting from use.

3. Information accuracy & navigation — Alert data may be delayed, partial, or incorrect. Map and shelter data may not reflect current field conditions. The app is an auxiliary tool only.

4. Location data — GPS data is used solely for local navigation. Not stored on servers and not transferred to third parties for advertising. Subject to the operating system's privacy policy.

5. Use restrictions — Do not use the app for emergency force management, operational coordination, autonomous vehicle control, or any use where failure could cause risk to life.

6. Changes to terms — Operators may change these terms at any time. Continued use constitutes agreement to the updated terms.

7. Contact — support@red-alert.live
footer.copyright: © RED ALERT LIVE – All rights reserved
footer.gender_note: Site text written in masculine form for convenience only, intended for all genders

form.error_org_required: Please fill in organization name (required for authorities and professionals)
